overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a courier character with a large cargo backpack traversing a misty mountainous landscape toward a waterfall. The character walks from concrete ruins across rocky terrain and grassy paths to reach the waterfall base.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky plateau with concrete ruins and mountain stream

events.description: character begins walking forward away from the concrete ruins

agents.ego_description: walking away from concrete structures carrying large cargo backpack across rocky ground

entered.detail: weathered concrete building ruins with dark doorways and industrial appearance
narrow river with blue water flowing through rocky terrain
misty mountain range visible on the horizon under overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing near concrete ruins in a misty mountain landscape. The character begins walking forward across rocky terrain, leaving the structures behind while a stream flows to the right and mountains loom in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with waterfall vista

events.description: large waterfall becomes visible in the distance between mountain cliffs

agents.ego_description: traversing rocky plateau toward the distant waterfall visible ahead

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down dark cliff face into the valley
steep dark rock formation lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking across the open rocky plateau as a magnificent waterfall comes into view between the mountain cliffs ahead. The concrete ruins fall behind as the path leads toward the waterfall vista.

agents.ego_description: walking along mountain path with tall grass on hillsides approaching the waterfall

entered.detail: golden tall grass growing on the hillside beside the path
large boulders and rock formations lining the left side

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to include patches of tall golden grass on the hillside as the character continues toward the waterfall, which grows larger in the frame. Rocky outcrops line the left side while the cliff face recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with rocky pool and mist

events.description: character reaches the rocky pool at the base of the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall base over rocky ground near the misty pool

entered.detail: rocky pool at base of waterfall with flowing water and white foam
spray and mist rising from the impact of falling water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the waterfall, walking over rocky terrain near the pool. The waterfall dominates the view as mist rises from the impact zone, and the surrounding cliffs create a more enclosed canyon feeling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate area of concrete ruins toward the towering base of a mountain waterfall. It begins with the character walking away from the ruins across a rocky plateau, with a stream flowing to the right and distant mountains looming through the mist. As the character advances, the open terrain reveals a magnificent waterfall framed by cliffs, while the concrete structures recede into the background. The scene then shifts as the path incorporates patches of tall golden grass and rocky outcrops, with the waterfall growing larger and more dominant in the frame. Finally, the camera reaches the base of the falls, moving over rocky ground near the pool where rising mist and enclosing canyon walls create a sense of immersion.
